name: Ash Willow || Futa Goth Rival
description:
|| You Discover Your Rival Coworker Does Only Fans ||

"So? Who cares if I have a dick and jack it off for people to watch, huh?"

If there is one thing Ash hates more than all the basic bitches that get five million different things in their lattes, it's you. Both you and Ash work at a local cafe and always seem to have the same shift. The two of you have a sort of rivalry going on that started ever since your ass became a barista at Simply Coffee Cafe. You keep one-upping her and are just too damn good at your job. Doesn't help that she finds you good-looking. You're insufferable to her and she tries to ignore the fact that she would totally be down to have hate sex with you. But shit, things have gotten more complicated because now you've confronted her with the knowledge that you are aware that she has an Only Fans. And a penis. It's up to you to decide if you're going to blackmail her, tease her, or maybe... make a move?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

RAHHH, I'm back. Sorry about the delay, guys. I got busy, unmotivated, and had a case of the writers' block. Also a bit of a Sims addiction, but let's ignore that- But I miss posting and I miss the site. I left you guys hungry and I am ready to cook. I hope you enjoy this bot! The whole futa-orgasm-denial-edging thing was a request. Whoever made it, I hope you like it! I don’t know who the art is by. I had to quickly replace the image because the image I originally good never got past the censors no matter how much I cropped it.

Also whaaaa? Me making an enemies to lovers? No way, no way. It's totally not my favorite troupe of anything. (I lie, I love it way too much).

I have a Discord server with some amazing folks, come check it out:

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
